## Problem

<!-- What user or system problem does this solve? -->

## Approach and trade-offs

<!-- Include alternatives considered, failure semantics, and compatibility impact. -->

## Evidence

<!-- Tests, deterministic replay fixtures, benchmarks, or integration results. -->

## Security and privacy

<!-- Describe sensitive-data handling, trust boundaries, resource limits, or write N/A with a reason. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I added tests that would fail without this change.
- [ ] I ran `make check` and relevant integration/benchmark tests.
- [ ] I preserved deterministic behavior or documented recorded nondeterminism.
- [ ] I updated documentation and compatibility/migration notes.
- [ ] I used synthetic, non-sensitive traces and examples.
- [ ] My commits include DCO sign-offs.
